verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I won't forget the price You paid Though death was mine, You took my place I won't forget the sacrifice For to this love I owe my life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, oh the wonder of Your name Jesus, I'm forever changed

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You've searched my heart and know my ways You've held me in Your hands of grace Now I have found my peace with God A refuge in my Savior's love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You came in the night and tore down the walls That held my broken heart When all I could see lay ruined and scarred Your light shattered the dark.
